title: Windshields required
doc_html:
§357.  Windshields required

Every passenger vehicle, other than a motorcycle, and every motor truck or truck tractor, and every authorized emergency vehicle shall be equipped with an adequate windshield.

Acts 1962, No. 310, §1.
